question: Show the country of players with earnings more than 1400000 and players with earnings less than 1100000.
sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings > 1400000 OR Earnings < 1100000;

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的国家

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求显示同时满足 earnings > 1400000 和 earnings < 1100000 的玩家的国家，但 SQL 反向翻译的描述中两个过滤条件是互斥的，无法同时满足，因此语义不一致。
